title: Floral Wreath Cookie Cutter 3D Printed Food Safe PLA Medium 7-8cm
description:
This beautiful floral wreath cookie cutter is printed in food-safe PLA and measures approximately 7-8cm for size M. Perfect for home bakers and gifters alike. The intricate design creates stunning cookies for any occasion. Each cutter is printed to order in our small batch workshop.

Features:
- Food-safe PLA material
- 1.8mm walls for durability
- Clean edges for sharp cookie outlines
- Dishwasher NOT safe — hand wash only

Dimensions:
Size M is approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) wide.

How to Use:
Press firmly into chilled cookie dough and lift cleanly. Chill dough between batches for best results.

Care Instructions:
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven.

Gift Ideas:
This floral wreath cutter makes a wonderful gift for bakers, crafters, and anyone who loves homemade cookies. Perfect for birthdays, holidays, bridal showers, and housewarming parties. A thoughtful present for the home baker in your life.

About Our Shop:
We are a small batch 3D printing studio specializing in food-safe baking tools. Every item is printed to order with care and attention to detail. We ship to the US and EU with fast turnaround times.
